cards.name: ACHILLES

abilities.name: Iroiki Taxitita
abilities.text: Move one space diagonally.

cards.flavor: Achilles stands as the greatest and most feared warrior of the Trojan War.
cards.raw_source_text: ACHILLES (Fire) 8 Life 3 Speed +0 9 Experience –1 � –1 1 Damage Greek • Warrior • Male Iroiki Taxitita – Action: Move one space diagonally. Achilles stands as the greatest and most feared warrior of the Trojan War. Illustration: Chris Appel 1 91/100

cards.name: ALEXANDER III OF MACEDON

abilities.name: Kalutera einai na kaeis para na argosviseis
abilities.text: If you do not win initiative, take 1 damage. You always take the first turn each round.

cards.flavor: Alexander has been wounded in battle several times, but that never prevents him from leading his troops from the front.
cards.raw_source_text: ALEXANDER III OF MACEDON (Water) 8 Life 3 Speed 5 Experience +1 � +1 1 Damage Greek • Warrior • Male Kalutera einai na kaeis para na argosviseis: If you do not win initiative, take 1 damage. You always take the first turn each round. Alexander has been wounded in battle several times, but that never prevents him from leading his troops from the front. Illustration: Randy Gallegos 1 P1/10

cards.name: ALEXANDER THE GREAT

abilities.name: Kataktas
abilities.text: Your attacks deal +1 damage against warriors with more life than you.

cards.flavor: Driven to surpass his father, Alexander’s ambition extends to the ends of the world.
cards.raw_source_text: ALEXANDER THE GREAT (Fire) 8 Life 3 Speed +0 –1 4 Experience � 1 Damage Greek • Warrior • Male Kataktas: Your attacks deal +1 damage against warriors with more life than you. Driven to surpass his father, Alexander’s ambition extends to the ends of the world. Illustration: Chris Appel 1 01/100

cards.name: AMAZONIA

abilities.name: Utriusque Manus Compos
abilities.text: You may use up to two weapons.

cards.flavor: Amazonia is the most famous gladiatrix of her time.
cards.raw_source_text: AMAZONIA (Water) 6 Life 3 Speed –2 –1 –2 9 Experience +0 � 1 Damage Roman • Warrior • Female Utriusque Manus Compos: You may use up to two weapons. Amazonia is the most famous gladiatrix of her time. Illustration: Steven Belledin 1 76/100

cards.name: BEOWULF

abilities.name: Tenacity
abilities.text: During their turns, opposing warriors must spend an additional action to move out of a space in any of your attack grids.

cards.flavor: Sixth century Geat King Beowulf rides the waves in search of a worthy challenge.
cards.raw_source_text: BEOWULF (Metal) 7 Life 3 Speed +0 –2 6 Experience � +0 1 Damage Norse • Warrior • Male Tenacity: During their turns, opposing warriors must spend an additional action to move out of a space in any of your attack grids. Sixth century Geat King Beowulf rides the waves in search of a worthy challenge. Illustration: Sam Wood 1 52/100

cards.name: CANUTE I OF DENMARK

abilities.name: Ydmyk
abilities.text: Once per challenge, at the beginning of a round, replace all modifiers on all attack grids with “+0”

cards.flavor: modifiers for that round. A humble and wise man, Danish King Canute demonstrates the limits of his power by vainly ordering the sea to retreat.
cards.raw_source_text: CANUTE I OF DENMARK (Water) 7 Life 3 Speed –1 –1 –1 4 Experience –1 � –1 1 Damage Norse • Warrior • Male Ydmyk: Once per challenge, at the beginning of a round, replace all modifiers on all attack grids with “+0” modifiers for that round. A humble and wise man, Danish King Canute demonstrates the limits of his power by vainly ordering the sea to retreat. Illustration: Terese Nielsen 1 P6/10

cards.name: CANUTE THE GREAT

abilities.name: En
abilities.text: This card count as all elements.

cards.flavor: Danish King and legendary member of the Jomsvikings, Canute wears three crowns, including the Crown of England.
cards.raw_source_text: CANUTE THE GREAT (Wood) 9 Life 3 Speed +0 +0 6 Experience +0 � +1 1 Damage Norse • Warrior • Male En: This card count as all elements. Danish King and legendary member of the Jomsvikings, Canute wears three crowns, including the Crown of England. Illustration: Kev Walker 1 46/100

cards.name: FREYDIS EIRIKSDOTTIR
cards.flavor: Greenlanders and Icelanders leave their homes in search of Vinland, a land shrouded in myth, yet held to be real. Leading these men and women on the quest for this new land is Freydis, daughter of the infamous Eirik the Red, and her husband Thorvard.
cards.raw_source_text: FREYDIS EIRIKSDOTTIR (Water) 7 Life 4 Speed –2 –2 2 Experience +0 � 1 Damage Norse • Warrior • Female Greenlanders and Icelanders leave their homes in search of Vinland, a land shrouded in myth, yet held to be real. Leading these men and women on the quest for this new land is Freydis, daughter of the infamous Eirik the Red, and her husband Thorvard. Illustration: RK Post 1 58/100

cards.name: GAIUS JULIUS

abilities.name: Veni, Vidi, Vici
abilities.text: Once per turn, when you hit a warrior with a basic attack, turn that warrior to face any direction.

cards.flavor: Ordered by the Senate to conquer Gaul, Gaius Julius will return to Rome to proclaim himself Emperor.
cards.raw_source_text: GAIUS JULIUS (Fire) 6 Life 3 Speed +0 10 Experience +0 � 1 Damage +0 Roman • Warrior • Male Veni, Vidi, Vici: Once per turn, when you hit a warrior with a basic attack, turn that warrior to face any direction. Ordered by the Senate to conquer Gaul, Gaius Julius will return to Rome to proclaim himself Emperor. Illustration: Jeremy Jarvis 1 P8/10

cards.name: GEAT KING BEOWULF

abilities.name: Erfaren
abilities.text: Each round, if you win initiative, your attack rolls gain +1 for that round. If you do not win initiative, your defense rolls gain +1 for that round.

cards.flavor: After mortally wounding Grendel, Beowulf goes after the creature's mother as well.
cards.raw_source_text: GEAT KING BEOWULF (Earth) 7 Life 3 Speed +1 4 Experience +0 � 1 Damage –1 Norse • Warrior • Male Erfaren: Each round, if you win initiative, your attack rolls gain +1 for that round. If you do not win initiative, your defense rolls gain +1 for that round. After mortally wounding Grendel, Beowulf goes after the creature's mother as well. Illustration: Hugh Jameson 1 P7/10

cards.name: GRETTIR THE STRONG

abilities.name: Sterk
abilities.text: Your attacks with axes deal +1 damage. Your attack rolls that are doubles do not count as critical hits.

cards.flavor: Grettir, outlaw son of Asmund, is the epitome of the warrior poet. However, ill luck stalks him all his life as does a bad reputation.
cards.raw_source_text: GRETTIR THE STRONG (Metal) 7 Life 3 Speed –1 –1 5 Experience � 1 Damage Norse • Warrior • Male Sterk: Your attacks with axes deal +1 damage. Your attack rolls that are doubles do not count as critical hits. Grettir, outlaw son of Asmund, is the epitome of the warrior poet. However, ill luck stalks him all his life as does a bad reputation. Illustration: David Ho 1 64/100

cards.name: HARALD HARDRADA

abilities.name: Hardfør
abilities.text: Once per turn, when you take damage, you may roll two dice. If that total is less than 7, you take 1 less damage to a minimum of 1.

cards.flavor: A renowned warrior and Norwegian king, Harald is famed for his ability to take castles and for his love of plunder.
cards.raw_source_text: HARALD HARDRADA (Metal) 7 Life 3 Speed –1 –1 8 Experience � +0 1 Damage Norse • Warrior • Male Hardfør: Once per turn, when you take damage, you may roll two dice. If that total is less than 7, you take 1 less damage to a minimum of 1. A renowned warrior and Norwegian king, Harald is famed for his ability to take castles and for his love of plunder. Illustration: Alan Pollock 1 51/100

cards.name: HERAKLES

abilities.name: Kairdoskopos
abilities.text: Once per round, after an enemy warrior moves into your basic attack grid, you may immediately make a basic attack against that warrior.

cards.flavor: Herakles’ boundless strength and courage eventually earn him a place among the gods on Mount Olympus.
cards.raw_source_text: HERAKLES (Earth) 6 Life 3 Speed +0 –1 4 Experience � –1 1 Damage Greek • Warrior • Male Kairdoskopos: Once per round, after an enemy warrior moves into your basic attack grid, you may immediately make a basic attack against that warrior. Herakles’ boundless strength and courage eventually earn him a place among the gods on Mount Olympus. Illustration: Greg Staples 1 11/100

cards.name: JULIUS CAESAR

abilities.name: Alea Iacta Est
abilities.text: Once per turn, before you roll the dice, the roll is considered to be a 7.

cards.flavor: As a priest, lawyer, warrior, general and Caesar, Gaius Julius leaves his mark both with his mind and with his sword.
cards.raw_source_text: JULIUS CAESAR (Earth) 7 Life 3 Speed +0 –1 3 Experience � +0 1 Damage Roman • Warrior • Male Alea Iacta Est: Once per turn, before you roll the dice, the roll is considered to be a 7. As a priest, lawyer, warrior, general and Caesar, Gaius Julius leaves his mark both with his mind and with his sword. Illustration: Michael Komarck 1 69/100

cards.name: LEONIDAS

abilities.name: Molon Lave
abilities.text: Once per round, after you deal damage to an enemy warrior, gain 1 life.

cards.flavor: Against overwhelming odds, Spartan Kink Leonidas and his brave 300 fight to the death so that others may live.
cards.raw_source_text: LEONIDAS (Wood) 8 Life 3 Speed –1 +0 3 Experience � –1 1 Damage Greek • Warrior • Male Molon Lave: Once per round, after you deal damage to an enemy warrior, gain 1 life. Against overwhelming odds, Spartan Kink Leonidas and his brave 300 fight to the death so that others may live. Illustration: Drew Baker 1 06/100

cards.name: LEONIDAS I OF SPARTA

abilities.name: Romaleos
abilities.text: Once per round, one of your attack or defense rolls gains a bonus equal to the number of opposing warriors.

abilities.name: Improving Odds
abilities.text: When an opposing warrior is defeated, gain 2 life.

cards.flavor: Leonidas leads his troops against the might of Xerxes at Thermopylae, even though he knows they will all die.
cards.raw_source_text: LEONIDAS I OF SPARTA (Wood) 7 Life 3 Speed +0 6 Experience � +0 1 Damage +0 Greek • Warrior • Male Romaleos: Once per round, one of your attack or defense rolls gains a bonus equal to the number of opposing warriors. Improving Odds: When an opposing warrior is defeated, gain 2 life. Leonidas leads his troops against the might of Xerxes at Thermopylae, even though he knows they will all die. Illustration: Steven Beladdin 1 P2/10

cards.name: MARCUS CLAUDIUS MARCELLUS

abilities.name: Gladius Romae
abilities.text: If you are in another warrior’s attack grid, make a basic attack on that warrior. Your attack roll gains +1 and this attack deals no more than one damage.

cards.flavor: Known as "The Sword of Rome", Marcellus conquers Syracuse, as well as securing innumerable other military victories for the Republic.
cards.raw_source_text: MARCUS CLAUDIUS MARCELLUS (Earth) 8 Life 3 Speed 1 Experience � 1 Damage Roman • Warrior • Male Gladius Romae – Action: If you are in another warrior’s attack grid, make a basic attack on that warrior. Your attack roll gains +1 and this attack deals no more than one damage. Known as "The Sword of Rome", Marcellus conquers Syracuse, as well as securing innumerable other military victories for the Republic. Illustration: Mark Zug 1 81/100

cards.name: MAXIMINUS

abilities.name: Ardor Deorum
abilities.text: Your attack rolls gain +1 while you have an inspiration in play.

cards.flavor: A giant of a man at over 2.6 meters tall, Maximinus is as unforgiving of his subjects as he is of his enemies.
cards.raw_source_text: MAXIMINUS (Earth) 8 Life 3 Speed +0 –1 3 Experience –1 � 1 Damage Roman • Warrior • Male Ardor Deorum: Your attack rolls gain +1 while you have an inspiration in play. A giant of a man at over 2.6 meters tall, Maximinus is as unforgiving of his subjects as he is of his enemies. Illustration: Alan Pollack 1 86/100

cards.name: MILO OF CROTON

abilities.name: Xoris Fragmo
abilities.text: Your base attacks deal +1 damage while you have no face-up weapon cards.

cards.flavor: Milo’s amazing strength and indomitable pride help him win six Olympic wrestling tournaments.
cards.raw_source_text: MILO OF CROTON (Wood) 8 Life 3 Speed –1 8 Experience –1 � –1 1 Damage Greek • Warrior • Male Xoris Fragmo: Your base attacks deal +1 damage while you have no face-up weapon cards. Milo’s amazing strength and indomitable pride help him win six Olympic wrestling tournaments. Illustration: Jason Engle 1 16/100

cards.name: MIYAMOTO MUSASHI

abilities.name: Niten Ichi Ryu
abilities.text: Your next attack this turn deals +1 damage.

cards.flavor: After killing his first opponent at the age of 13, Musashi remains undefeated through sixty-one duels.
cards.raw_source_text: MIYAMOTO MUSASHI (Fire) 9 Life 3 Speed +1 –1 8 Experience � +0 1 Damage –1 –1 Japanese • Warrior • Male Niten Ichi Ryu – Action: Your next attack this turn deals +1 damage. After killing his first opponent at the age of 13, Musashi remains undefeated through sixty-one duels. Illustration: Sam Wood 1 39/100

cards.name: NAKANO TAKEKO

abilities.name: Roshui-gun
abilities.text: After you hit a warrior with a weapon attack, you may move one space.

cards.flavor: As head of the roshui-gun, weapon master Nakano Takeko leads her female samurai into battle.
cards.raw_source_text: NAKANO TAKEKO (Fire) 7 Life 3 Speed +0 +0 6 Experience +0 � 1 Damage Japanese • Warrior • Female Roshui-gun: After you hit a warrior with a weapon attack, you may move one space. As head of the roshui-gun, weapon master Nakano Takeko leads her female samurai into battle. Illustration: Drew Baker 1 26/100

cards.name: NINJA

abilities.name: Ninjutsu
abilities.text: Your attacks deal +1 damage while you are not in the defending opponent’s basic attack grid.

abilities.name: Shinobi
abilities.text: This warrior may not use two-handed weapons.

cards.flavor: Ninja assassins, "those who move in secrecy", travel through the shadows towards their mark.
cards.raw_source_text: NINJA (Wind) 7 Life 3 Speed –1 –1 –1 2 Experience –1 � –1 1 Damage Japanese • Warrior • Male Ninjutsu: Your attacks deal +1 damage while you are not in the defending opponent’s basic attack grid. Shinobi: This warrior may not use two-handed weapons. Ninja assassins, "those who move in secrecy", travel through the shadows towards their mark. Illustration: William O’Connor 1 41/100

cards.name: NOBUNAGA

abilities.name: Houtan
abilities.text: Every time a reveal ability is used, gain 1 life.

cards.flavor: Nobunaga never ceases to surprise his enemies with new and daring tactics.
cards.raw_source_text: NOBUNAGA (Water) 8 Life 3 Speed +0 5 Experience +1 � 1 Damage –1 Japanese • Warrior • Male Houtan: Every time a reveal ability is used, gain 1 life. Nobunaga never ceases to surprise his enemies with new and daring tactics. Illustration: Chris Mobler 1 P4/10

cards.name: ODA NOBUNAGA

abilities.name: Roukou
abilities.text: You win ties with warriors that do not have the Roukou ability, regardless of experience.

cards.flavor: Nobunaga’s battlefield brilliance has secured his place as one of the most brutally effective military leaders of all time.
cards.raw_source_text: ODA NOBUNAGA (Fire) 8 Life 3 Speed +0 +0 1 Experience � 1 Damage Japanese • Warrior • Male Roukou: You win ties with warriors that do not have the Roukou ability, regardless of experience. Nobunaga’s battlefield brilliance has secured his place as one of the most brutally effective military leaders of all time. Illustration: Rob Alexander 1 21/100

cards.name: SAITO MUSASHIBO BENKEI

abilities.name: Toushimanman
abilities.text: After you hit an opponent with a basic attack, they cannot attack you with a weapon this round.

cards.flavor: A giant of a man, with legendary strength and skill, warrior monk Benkei of the Yamabushi comes to embody some of the greatest qualities of the Japanese warrior.
cards.raw_source_text: SAITO MUSASHIBO BENKEI (Fire) 8 Life 3 Speed –1 –1 6 Experience � +0 1 Damage Japanese • Warrior • Male Toushimanman: After you hit an opponent with a basic attack, they cannot attack you with a weapon this round. A giant of a man, with legendary strength and skill, warrior monk Benkei of the Yamabushi comes to embody some of the greatest qualities of the Japanese warrior. Illustration: Ezra Tucker 1 33/100

cards.name: SHINMEN TAKEZO

abilities.name: Kyougou
abilities.text: Your attack rolls gain +2. Your attacks with swords deal +1 damage.

cards.flavor: Towards the end of his life, Miyamoto Mushashi retires to a cave to perfect his understandings of strategy and to scribe the Gorin No Sho.
cards.raw_source_text: SHINMEN TAKEZO (Wind) 7 Life 2 Speed –1 +2 –1 7 Experience � 1 Damage Japanese • Warrior • Male Kyougou: Your attack rolls gain +2. Your attacks with swords deal +1 damage. Towards the end of his life, Miyamoto Mushashi retires to a cave to perfect his understandings of strategy and to scribe the Gorin No Sho. Illustration: Carl Frank 1 P5/10

cards.name: SPARTACUS

abilities.name: Ars Gladiatoria
abilities.text: If you have an inspiration in play, make an extra attack with one of your weapons.

cards.flavor: Thracian gladiator, slave and rebel leader, Spartacus emancipates himself and wreaks havoc on the Roman Empire.
cards.raw_source_text: SPARTACUS (Metal) 8 Life 3 Speed –1 –1 6 Experience � 1 Damage Roman • Warrior • Male Ars Gladiatoria - 2 Actions: If you have an inspiration in play, make an extra attack with one of your weapons. Thracian gladiator, slave and rebel leader, Spartacus emancipates himself and wreaks havoc on the Roman Empire. Illustration: Mark Poole 1 96/100

cards.name: SPARTACUS OF THRACE

abilities.name: Rebellis
abilities.text: Your critical hits deal +2 damage instead of doubling base damage.

cards.flavor: Before he ever leads a slave revolt against Rome, Spartacus is one of the most feared gladiators in the coliseum.
cards.raw_source_text: SPARTACUS OF THRACE (Earth) 7 Life 3 Speed +0 +0 3 Experience +1 � 1 Damage Roman • Warrior • Male Rebellis: Your critical hits deal +2 damage instead of doubling base damage. Before he ever leads a slave revolt against Rome, Spartacus is one of the most feared gladiators in the coliseum. Illustration: John Donahue 1 P10/10

cards.name: AMATERASU

abilities.name: Hikarimono
abilities.text: At the beginning of this round, if you have less life than all other warriors, you gain +1 speed for this round.

cards.flavor: Amaterasu rules the Shinto religion as supreme goddess of the sun and queen of the kami.
cards.raw_source_text: (7) AMATERASU (Wind) Japanese • Inspiration • Deity Hikarimono – Reveal: At the beginning of this round, if you have less life than all other warriors, you gain +1 speed for this round. Amaterasu rules the Shinto religion as supreme goddess of the sun and queen of the kami. Illustration: Drew Baker 1 28/100

cards.name: APOLLO

abilities.name: Cura Dei
abilities.text: Your attack rolls gain +1 this round.

cards.flavor: God of art, light and healing, Apollo pulls the sun across the sky behind his four horse chariot. lllustration: Mark Zug
cards.raw_source_text: (5) APOLLO (Fire) Roman • Inspiration • Deity Cura Dei – Reveal: Your attack rolls gain +1 this round. God of art, light and healing, Apollo pulls the sun across the sky behind his four horse chariot. lllustration: Mark Zug 1 82/100

cards.name: BISHAMON-TEN

abilities.name: Hogosha
abilities.text: All warriors’ attack rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: Shinto god of war and happiness, as well as one of the seven kami of luck, Bishamon protects the cardinal north and the Japanese people from danger.
cards.raw_source_text: (2) BISHAMON-TEN (Fire) Japanese • Inspiration • Deity Hogosha: All warriors’ attack rolls gain +1. Shinto god of war and happiness, as well as one of the seven kami of luck, Bishamon protects the cardinal north and the Japanese people from danger. Illustration: Ezra Tucker 1 34/100

cards.name: BLOSSIUS OF CUMAE

abilities.name: Primus ultimus erit, atque ultimus primus
abilities.text: If you are a metal warrior, resolve initiative from lowest to highest this challenge.

cards.flavor: Stoic philosopher Blossius of Cumae stirs the soul to action, regardless of the Empire and its laws.
cards.raw_source_text: (0) BLOSSIUS OF CUMAE (Water) Roman • Inspiration • Philosopher Primus ultimus erit, atque ultimus primus: If you are a metal warrior, resolve initiative from lowest to highest this challenge. Stoic philosopher Blossius of Cumae stirs the soul to action, regardless of the Empire and its laws. Illustration: Mark Poole 1 97/100

cards.name: BUSHIDO

abilities.name: Soujoukouka
abilities.text: If all of your face-up cards are Japanese, all of your rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: The seven tenets of bushido are Yuki (valor), Jin (benevolence), Gi (rectitude), Rei (etiquette), Makoto (honesty), Chugi (loyalty) and Meiyo (honor).
cards.raw_source_text: (7) BUSHIDO (Fire) Japanese • Inspiration • Code Soujoukouka: If all of your face-up cards are Japanese, all of your rolls gain +1. The seven tenets of bushido are Yuki (valor), Jin (benevolence), Gi (rectitude), Rei (etiquette), Makoto (honesty), Chugi (loyalty) and Meiyo (honor). Illustration: Brad Williams 1 P3/10

cards.name: GRENDEL

abilities.name: Intimidation
abilities.text: Choose an opposing warrior and roll two dice. If the total is greater than that warrior’s experience, that warrior must spend an additional action to attack this round.

cards.flavor: Grendel the giant will dine with anyone who enters "his" hall after dark.
cards.raw_source_text: (5) GRENDEL (Wood) Norse • Inspiration • Quest Intimidation – Reveal: Choose an opposing warrior and roll two dice. If the total is greater than that warrior’s experience, that warrior must spend an additional action to attack this round. Grendel the giant will dine with anyone who enters "his" hall after dark. Illustration: Sam Wood 1 60/100

cards.name: IZANAGI

abilities.name: Zonrei
abilities.text: Roll two dice. If the total is less than your experience, gain 2 life.

cards.flavor: Izanagi, god of the life and all that is heavenly, creates the Japanese islands with his sister and wife, Izanami.
cards.raw_source_text: (6) IZANAGI (Earth) Japanese • Inspiration • Deity Zonrei – Reveal: Roll two dice. If the total is less than your experience, gain 2 life. Izanagi, god of the life and all that is heavenly, creates the Japanese islands with his sister and wife, Izanami. Illustration: Rob Alexander 1 22/100

cards.name: IZANAMI

abilities.name: Ma
abilities.text: Roll 2 dice. If the total is greater than 7, (or greater than 5 if you are a wind warrior), then move to any empty space in the arena.

cards.flavor: Izanami, sister and wife of Izanagi, rules the underworld as the goddess of death and all things dark.
cards.raw_source_text: (4) IZANAMI (Wind) Japanese • Inspiration • Deity Ma – Reveal: Roll 2 dice. If the total is greater than 7, (or greater than 5 if you are a wind warrior), then move to any empty space in the arena. Izanami, sister and wife of Izanagi, rules the underworld as the goddess of death and all things dark. Illustration: William O’Connor 1 42/100

cards.name: JUPITER

abilities.name: Vis lovis
abilities.text: Each round, if you win initiative, your attacks deal +1 damage that round.

cards.flavor: As supreme god of the Roman pantheon, Jupiter rules the gods, the skies and the weather.
cards.raw_source_text: (5) JUPITER (Earth) Roman • Inspiration • Deity Vis lovis: Each round, if you win initiative, your attacks deal +1 damage that round. As supreme god of the Roman pantheon, Jupiter rules the gods, the skies and the weather. Illustration: Michael Komarck 1 70/100

cards.name: LOKI

abilities.name: Kneb
abilities.text: Choose an opposing warrior’s face-up weapon. If you have a face-up weapon, exchange that card for your opponent’s weapon until the end of the round.

cards.flavor: God of trickery and mischief, Loki plagues the Aesir with his crafty, often malicious pranks.
cards.raw_source_text: (6) LOKI (Wind) Norse • Inspiration • Deity Kneb – Reveal: Choose an opposing warrior’s face-up weapon. If you have a face-up weapon, exchange that card for your opponent’s weapon until the end of the round. God of trickery and mischief, Loki plagues the Aesir with his crafty, often malicious pranks. Illustration: David Ho 1 65/100

cards.name: MARS

abilities.name: Concors
abilities.text: If all of your face-up cards are Roman, all of your rolls gain +1.

cards.flavor: War god and father of Romulus and Remus, Mars one of the most revered and worshipped gods in the Roman pantheon.
cards.raw_source_text: (4) MARS (Earth) Roman • Inspiration • Diety Concors: If all of your face-up cards are Roman, all of your rolls gain +1. War god and father of Romulus and Remus, Mars one of the most revered and worshipped gods in the Roman pantheon. Illustration: Greg Staples 1 P9/10

cards.name: MERCURY

abilities.name: Nuntius
abilities.text: All warriors gain +2 speed this round.

cards.flavor: Running on winged heels, Mercury, the god of speed, delivers messages for the immortals.
cards.raw_source_text: (9) MERCURY (Fire) Roman • Inspiration • Deity Nuntius – Reveal: All warriors gain +2 speed this round. Running on winged heels, Mercury, the god of speed, delivers messages for the immortals. Illustration: Mark Poole 1 77/100

cards.name: MUSHA-SHUGYO

abilities.name: Sho Shin
abilities.text: For this round, all hits for all players are critical hits.

cards.flavor: Surviving the warrior pilgimage signifies the birth of a true samurai.
cards.raw_source_text: (5) MUSHA-SHUGYO (Earth) Japanese • Inspiration • Quest Sho Shin – Reveal: For this round, all hits for all players are critical hits. Surviving the warrior pilgimage signifies the birth of a true samurai. Illustration: Sam Wood 1 40/100

cards.name: NEMESIS

abilities.name: Ekdikisi
abilities.text: The next card you reveal gains +10 initiative.

cards.flavor: The goddess of retribution, Nemesis punishes excessive pride and undeserved happiness.
cards.raw_source_text: (1) NEMESIS (Wind) Greek • Inspiration • Deity Ekdikisi: The next card you reveal gains +10 initiative. The goddess of retribution, Nemesis punishes excessive pride and undeserved happiness. Illustration: Drew Baker 1 07/100

cards.name: ODIN

abilities.name: Innsikt
abilities.text: When making attack or defense rolls, only roll one die. Your roll is equal to the die roll plus the attacking or defending opponent’s intiative for this round.

cards.flavor: One-eyed Odin leads the Aesir as the supreme god of the Norse pantheon.
cards.raw_source_text: (3) ODIN (Earth) Norse • Inspiration • Deity Innsikt: When making attack or defense rolls, only roll one die. Your roll is equal to the die roll plus the attacking or defending opponent’s intiative for this round. One-eyed Odin leads the Aesir as the supreme god of the Norse pantheon. Illustration: Kev Walker 1 47/100

cards.name: ORACLE OF DELPHI

abilities.name: Propheteia
abilities.text: Look at all face-down cards. You may trade the placement of two of your face-down cards.

cards.flavor: At his temple in Delphi, Apollo speaks of the fate of the world through his Oracle, Pythia.
cards.raw_source_text: (2) ORACLE OF DELPHI (Water) Greek • Inspiration • Deity Propheteia – Reveal: Look at all face-down cards. You may trade the placement of two of your face-down cards. cards.name: PLUTO

abilities.name: Mors Venit
abilities.text: At the end of each player’s turn, that player’s warrior takes 1 damage if they did not hit another warrior this turn.

cards.flavor: Lord of the underworld, Pluto rules over the souls of those fallen in battle.
cards.raw_source_text: (7) PLUTO (Metal) Roman • Inspiration • Deity Mors Venit: At the end of each player’s turn, that player’s warrior takes 1 damage if they did not hit another warrior this turn. Lord of the underworld, Pluto rules over the souls of those fallen in battle. Illustration: Alan Pollack 1 87/100

cards.name: PYTHAGORAS

abilities.name: Sintomotera Odos
abilities.text: Move one space diagonally.

cards.flavor: A philosopher and mathematician, Pythagoras challenges thought with his insight and understanding.

cards.name: THETIS

abilities.name: Mitriki Agapi
abilities.text: Once per game, re-roll any one die or make your opponent re-roll any one die.

cards.flavor: Daughter of Nereus and Doris, Thetis is the queen of the sea nymphs and mother of Achilles.
cards.raw_source_text: (3) THETIS (Water) Greek • Inspiration • Deity Mitriki Agapi: Once per game, re-roll any one die or make your opponent re-roll any one die. Daughter of Nereus and Doris, Thetis is the queen of the sea nymphs and mother of Achilles. Illustration: Chris Appel 1 92/100

cards.name: THOR

abilities.name: Torden
abilities.text: After you roll doubles on a defense roll, deal 1 damage to the attacking warrior.

cards.flavor: Thor, the Norse god of thunder, protects human and god alike from the forces of evil.
cards.raw_source_text: (4) THOR (Earth) Norse • Inspiration • Deity Torden: After you roll doubles on a defense roll, deal 1 damage to the attacking warrior. Thor, the Norse god of thunder, protects human and god alike from the forces of evil. Illustration: Alan Pollock 1 53/100

cards.name: TYR

abilities.name: Mot
abilities.text: After you make a roll, if any of your dice is a 1, the roll is considered doubles, even if the dice are different.

cards.flavor: Boldest of the Norse gods, Tyr inspires heroism and courage in battle.
cards.raw_source_text: (8) TYR (Metal) Norse • Inspiration • Deity Mot: After you make a roll, if any of your dice is a 1, the roll is considered doubles, even if the dice are different. Boldest of the Norse gods, Tyr inspires heroism and courage in battle. Illustration: RK Post 1 59/100

cards.name: ZEUS

abilities.name: Diatagma tou Olimpou
abilities.text: At the beginning of any round, you may name an ability. That ability has no effect that round. After you name an ability, discard this card.

cards.flavor: Zeus rules Mount Olympus and all the Greek gods who dwell there.
cards.raw_source_text: (4) ZEUS (Earth) Greek • Inspiration • Deity Diatagma tou Olimpou: At the beginning of any round, you may name an ability. That ability has no effect that round. After you name an ability, discard this card. Zeus rules Mount Olympus and all the Greek gods who dwell there. Illustration: Greg Staples 1 12/100

cards.name: BOKKEN

abilities.name: Precision
abilities.text: Once per turn, you may re-roll one die on an attack roll.

abilities.name: Pair
abilities.text: You may use two “Bokken” cards in this game.

cards.flavor: Victory with a wooden sword demonstrates superior confidence and domination over bladed opponents.
cards.raw_source_text: (8) BOKKEN (1) +0 +2 � +1 Japanese • Weapon • Sword (1 hand) Precision: Once per turn, you may re-roll one die on an attack roll. cards.name: DANE AXE

abilities.name: Hogge
abilities.text: This weapon deals +1 damage for each of your other face-up support cards.

cards.flavor: The six-foot broadax can shear the head from a horse in a single blow.

cards.name: GLADIUS

abilities.name: Lamina Acuta
abilities.text: Attacks with this weapon deal +1 damage if you have a face up shield card. Attacks with this weapon deal +1 damage if the defender has no face-up armor card.

cards.flavor: Known as "the sword that conquered the world", the gladius is a remarkably balanced thrusting sword.
cards.raw_source_text: (6) GLADIUS (1) +1 +1 +0 � Roman • Weapon • Sword (1 Hand) Lamina Acuta: Attacks with this weapon deal +1 damage if you have a face up shield card. cards.name: KATANA

abilities.name: Ki ken tai itchi
abilities.text: When you hit with this weapon, the attacker and the defender each roll one die and add his or her warior’s experience. If your total is higher, you deal +1 damage this attack.

cards.flavor: The katana represents the heart and soul of the samurai; together, they cut down all who stand in the way of its curved blade.
cards.raw_source_text: (2) KATANA (2) +1 � +1 Japanese • Weapon • Sword (2 Hands) Ki ken tai itchi: When you hit with this weapon, the attacker and the defender each roll one die and add his or her warior’s experience. cards.name: KOPIS

abilities.name: Epithesi!
abilities.text: Attacks with this weapon deal +1 damage if you have moved this turn.

cards.flavor: Curved blades like the kopis make excellent slashing weapons.
cards.raw_source_text: (1) KOPIS (1) +2 +1 � +0 Greek • Weapon • Sword (1 Hand) Epithesi!: Attacks with this weapon deal +1 damage if you have moved this turn. Curved blades like the kopis make excellent slashing weapons. Illustration: Greg Staples 1 13/100

cards.name: LANGOX

abilities.name: Tung
abilities.text: Your other cards get –2 intiative.

cards.flavor: A lethal offensive choice, the langox leaves its wielder vulnerable on defense.

cards.name: LANGSEAX

abilities.name: Hurtig
abilities.text: Your attack rolls with this weapon get +1 for each of your other face-up support cards.

cards.flavor: The langseax doubles as a long knife and short sword for Norse warriors.

cards.name: NAGINATA

abilities.name: Sune-Uchi
abilities.text: Choose an opposing warrior and roll two dice. If the total is more than your opponent’s experience, the opposing warrior gets –2 initiative for the next round.

cards.flavor: Sweeping movements make this curved blade, mounted on the end of a long, wooden pole, devastating against both infantry and cavalry.

abilities.name: Tamokuteki
abilities.text: When making attacks rolls with this weapon, roll three dice and choose which two to use. Many samurai meet their end at the short, straight blade of this weapon.

cards.raw_source_text: (5) NINJA-TO (1) +1 +1 +0 � +0 Japanese • Weapon • Sword (1 Hand) Tamokuteki: When making attacks rolls with this weapon, roll three dice and choose which two to use. cards.name: PILUM

abilities.name: Perutilis
abilities.text: Discard this card to deal 1 damage to another warrior and discard that warrior’s face up shield card, if any.

cards.flavor: This metal-tipped javelin bends on impact, disabling shields and making it impossible to throw back.

cards.flavor: For the Roman Republican or Empirical warrior, the pugio is a favorite tool and backup weapon.

cards.name: ROPALO

abilities.name: Dinato Xtipima
abilities.text: Turn your warrior to face any direction. You may immediately make an attack with this weapon against each warrior in this weapons attack grid.

cards.flavor: The ropalo, a large club, is used simply to bludgeon opponents into submission.

abilities.name: Katastrofi panoplias

cards.flavor: This broad-leaf, 2.5-meter spear strikes fear into the hearts of those who oppose the Greek hoplite.

cards.name: SARISSAE

abilities.name: Phalanx

cards.name: SICA

abilities.name: Lamani Incurvata

cards.flavor: shields.

abilities.name: Kaste
abilities.text: Deal 1 damage to all warriors not adjacent to your warrior.

abilities.name: Liten

cards.name: SPARTAN LAKONIAN

abilities.name: Epithetiko Pleonektima

abilities.name: Caedo

cards.flavor: The spatha is the favorite slashing sword of the Roman cavalry and barbarian auxiliary.

cards.name: SVERD

abilities.name: Decisive Blow
abilities.text: Once per turn, after one of your attacks with this weapon is a critical hit, you may attack again with this weapon without spending an additional action.

cards.flavor: Forged twisted rods of hard and soft iron make this sword flexible and highly durable.

abilities.name: Zanshin

abilities.name: Eulogimeni Panoplia
abilities.text: Once per round, when you attack, you may make your enemy re-roll their defense roll. Discard this card if the result is lower than their original roll.

cards.flavor: After Hector takes Achilles’ armor, Hephaestus forges a replacement panoply like nothing ever seen.

cards.name: BEAR SARK

abilities.name: Bjorn
abilities.text: Once per round, when you are attacked, force the attacker to re-roll their attack roll. Discard this card if the result is lower than the original roll.

cards.flavor: Wearing this pelt gives the Norse warrior the strength, stamina and power of the bear itself.

cards.name: CAESAR’S GREAVES

abilities.name: Tutela Crusibus

cards.name: CASSIS

abilities.name: Galeatur
abilities.text: Your defense rolls gain +1 if you are a metal or water warrior. You gain +1 experience if you are an earth or fire warrior.

cards.flavor: Roman smiths crafted the cassis to be the most advanced, comfortable and functional helmet in the Roman Empire.

cards.name: DO

abilities.name: Yae

cards.name: GREAVES

abilities.name: Exostrakismos

cards.name: HAIDATE

abilities.name: Shinogeru
abilities.text: When you are attacked, your defense roll gain +1 if you have more experience than the attacker.

cards.flavor: Thigh plates protect the upper legs with reinforced strips of leather.

cards.name: HEALSBEORGS

abilities.name: Beskyttelse
abilities.text: After you are hit by a critical hit, reduce all damage from that attack to 0 and discard this card.

cards.flavor: Interlocking rings woven into the mail coif protect the head and neck.

cards.name: HJELM

abilities.name: Beskyttelsebriller
abilities.text: When you roll two dice for anything other than attack or defense, you may choose to add or subtract 2 from the roll.

cards.flavor: The Norse helmet is famous for its metal "goggles", which protect the eyes, nose and cheekbones.

cards.name: KIMONO

cards.flavor: The nearly weightless kimono robe allows swift movement and is a great place to conceal weapons.

cards.name: LEITER

abilities.name: Linothorax

cards.flavor: Glued linen forms the shell of this lightweight breastplate.

cards.name: LIONTARI

abilities.name: Apotropi

cards.flavor: This segmented armor, lightweight and flexible, revolutionizes chest protection.

cards.name: MEMPO

abilities.name: Ojikedzuku

cards.name: PTERYGES

abilities.name: Servata Tergi

cards.flavor: These hanging leather straps protect the upper legs and thighs.

cards.name: DE BELLO GALLICO

cards.flavor: Caesar’s scrolls outline his successes and experiences during the nine-year long Gallic campaigns.

cards.name: DISCIPLINA

abilities.name: Si vis pacem, para bellum
abilities.text: After you make an attack roll, you may increase the value of one of the dice by 1 if you won initiative this turn. If the dice are now doubles, the attack may result in a critical hit.

cards.flavor: The exceptional discipline of the Roman troops ensures their success across hundreds of battlefields.
cards.raw_source_text: (6) DISCIPLINA Roman • Special • Tome Si vis pacem, para bellum: After you make an attack roll, you may increase the value of one of the dice by 1 if you won initiative this turn. If the dice are now doubles, the attack may result in a critical hit. The exceptional discipline of the Roman troops ensures their success across hundreds of battlefields. Illustration: Mark Zug 1 85/100

cards.name: ELHAZ RUNE

abilities.name: Hellig
abilities.text: Choose a warrior with more life that you. Move to any space in that warriors attack grid.

cards.flavor: Norse warriors bear the Elhaz rune as a symbol of protection.
cards.raw_source_text: (5) ELHAZ RUNE Norse • Special • Mystic Hellig – Action: Choose a warrior with more life that you. Move to any space in that warriors attack grid. Norse warriors bear the Elhaz rune as a symbol of protection. Illustration: RK Post 1 63/100

cards.name: GORIN NO SHO

abilities.name: Heiho
abilities.text: Once per turn, when you make an attack roll, you may reduce the value of one of your dice by 1. If the dice become doubles, this may result in a critical hit.

cards.flavor: The Book of Five Elements represents Musashi’s thoughts on how to win in every possible situation.
cards.raw_source_text: (6) GORIN NO SHO Japanese • Special • Item Heiho: Once per turn, when you make an attack roll, you may reduce the value of one of your dice by 1. If the dice become doubles, this may result in a critical hit. The Book of Five Elements represents Musashi’s thoughts on how to win in every possible situation. Illustration: Ezra Tucker 1 29/100

cards.name: HOPLON

abilities.name: I tan i epi tas
abilities.text: Your defense rolls gain +1 while you have a face-up weapon card.

cards.flavor: These round, reinforced shields are the best protection wielded by the Greek Hoplites.
cards.raw_source_text: (2) HOPLON Greek • Special • Shield (1 Hand) I tan i epi tas: Your defense rolls gain +1 while you have a face-up weapon card. These round, reinforced shields are the best protection wielded by the Greek Hoplites. Illustration: Drew Baker 1 10/100

cards.name: KEMURI-KONA

abilities.name: Enmaku
abilities.text: You may move to any space in your starting row.

cards.flavor: These smoke grenades produce clouds of noxious, burning gas and make for very effective distractions.
cards.raw_source_text: (4) KEMURI-KONA Japanese • Special • Item Enmaku – Reveal: You may move to any space in your starting row. These smoke grenades produce clouds of noxious, burning gas and make for very effective distractions. Illustration: Drew Baker 1 32/100

cards.name: KOTYNOS

abilities.name: O Draskelismos Tou Protathliti
abilities.text: Once per round, you may re-roll your attack roll.

cards.flavor: The olive wreath symbolizes victory for the fastest, bravest and strongest.
cards.raw_source_text: (0) KOTYNOS Greek • Special • Item O Draskelismos Tou Protathliti: Once per round, you may re-roll your attack roll. The olive wreath symbolizes victory for the fastest, bravest and strongest. Illustration: Jason Engle 1 20/100

cards.name: KYUDO

abilities.name: Shuuchuu
abilities.text: Your attack rolls with ranged weapons gain +1.

cards.flavor: Japanese archery, known as kyudo or “the way of the bow”, uses Zen meditation as part of the technique.
cards.raw_source_text: (9) KYUDO Japanese • Special • Ability Shuuchuu: Your attack rolls with ranged weapons gain +1. Japanese archery, known as kyudo or “the way of the bow”, uses Zen meditation as part of the technique. Illustration: Rob Alexander 1 25/100

cards.name: MJOLLNIR

abilities.name: Slegge
abilities.text: After you are hit by a basic attack, roll two dice. If that total is greater than the attacker’s experience, deal 1 damage to that warrior.

cards.flavor: Mjollnir, Thor’s golden hammer, is so powerful that even Thor himself must wear magical iron gauntlets to wield it.
cards.raw_source_text: (4) MJOLLNIR Norse • Special • Item Slegge: After you are hit by a basic attack, roll two dice. If that total is greater than the attacker’s experience, deal 1 damage to that warrior. Mjollnir, Thor’s golden hammer, is so powerful that even Thor himself must wear magical iron gauntlets to wield it. Illustration: Alan Pollock 1 57/100

cards.name: PARMA

abilities.name: In Vicem Oppugnare
abilities.text: Your attack rolls gain +1 while you are not in an opponents basic attack grid Lightweight, small, round or square shields are well suited for arena and melee combat.

cards.raw_source_text: (4) PARMA Roman • Special • Shield (1 Hand) In Vicem Oppugnare: Your attack rolls gain +1 while you are not in an opponents basic attack grid Lightweight, small, round or square shields are well suited for arena and melee combat. Illustration: Mark Poole 1 100/100

cards.name: SCUTULUM

abilities.name: Clipeus
abilities.text: Your attack and defense rolls gain +1 while you have another face-up support card that adds a bonus to your defense rolls.

cards.flavor: Gladiators and Roman auxiliary troops wield the scutulum as a superior melee shield to the scutum.
cards.raw_source_text: (3) SCUTULUM Roman • Special • Shield (1 Hand) Clipeus: Your attack and defense rolls gain +1 while you have another face-up support card that adds a bonus to your defense rolls. Gladiators and Roman auxiliary troops wield the scutulum as a superior melee shield to the scutum. Illustration: Mark Poole 1 80/100

cards.name: SCUTUM

abilities.name: Scutatus
abilities.text: Once per round, after you make a successful attack, roll two dice. If that total is less than or equal to your experience, move the defending warrior one space.

cards.flavor: This convex, reinforced shield protects the legionary and doubles as a ram with its metal shield boss.
cards.raw_source_text: (2) SCUTUM Roman • Special • Shield (1 Hand) Scutatus: Once per round, after you make a successful attack, roll two dice. If that total is less than or equal to your experience, move the defending warrior one space. This convex, reinforced shield protects the legionary and doubles as a ram with its metal shield boss. Illustration: Alan Pollack Post 1 90/100

cards.name: SHIELD OF HEPHAESTUS

abilities.name: Dia Tis Pistis Aminomenos
abilities.text: Your defense rolls gain +1 while you have a face-up inspiration card.

cards.flavor: After Achilles’ death, Ajax and Odysseus fight for possession of this five-layered shield.
cards.raw_source_text: (1) SHIELD OF HEPHAESTUS Greek • Special • Shield (1 Hand) Dia Tis Pistis Aminomenos: Your defense rolls gain +1 while you have a face-up inspiration card. After Achilles’ death, Ajax and Odysseus fight for possession of this five-layered shield. Illustration: Chris Appel 1 95/100

cards.name: SHURIKEN

abilities.name: Ningu
abilities.text: Make a basic attack at +0 against any warrior that is not adjacent to your warrior.

cards.flavor: These razor-sharp throwing stars cut through the air with great accuracy, dealing silent death from the shadows.
cards.raw_source_text: (8) SHURIKEN Japanese • Special • Item Ningu – Action: Make a basic attack at +0 against any warrior that is not adjacent to your warrior. These razor-sharp throwing stars cut through the air with great accuracy, dealing silent death from the shadows. Illustration: William O’Connor 1 45/100

cards.name: SKJOLD

abilities.name: Ward
abilities.text: Once this round, before an opposing warrior attacks you, you may reduce all of their attack bonuses to zero.

cards.flavor: These flat, round, single-layered shields line the gunwales of long ships and accompany Norse warriors into battle.
cards.raw_source_text: (6) SKJOLD Norse • Special • Shield (1 Hand) Ward – Reveal: Once this round, before an opposing warrior attacks you, you may reduce all of their attack bonuses to zero. These flat, round, single-layered shields line the gunwales of long ships and accompany Norse warriors into battle. Illustration: Alan Pollack 1 72/100

cards.name: UMA

abilities.name: Subayai
abilities.text: Once per round, move two spaces.

cards.flavor: Native Japanese horses stand stout and short, allowing them to maneuver with great agility.
cards.raw_source_text: (7) UMA Japanese • Special • Cavalry Subayai – Action: Once per round, move two spaces. Native Japanese horses stand stout and short, allowing them to maneuver with great agility. Illustration: Ezra Tucker 1 38/100
